# This is a valid test configuration, but only tests things that could
# not be tested by daemon-stdio-config.txt.  See that file for more
# information.

[global]
cluster = mlx.hpc.uio.no
role=master

[http]
api-root = https://axis-of-eval.org:666
http-proxy = hell.local:777
http-payload-limit = 100M
sending-window = 3m
timeout = 5h
ca-file = zappa.pem
upload-password = SPECTRE
